'''zodawaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:eyelined|eyelined]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-d-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:eyelined|eyelined]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zodawaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zodawithi|zodawithi]] || [[word:zodawiji|zodawiji]] || [[word:zodawishi|zodawishi]] || [[word:zodawiki|zodawiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zodawuthuthu|zodawuthuthu]] || [[word:zodawujuju|zodawujuju]] || [[word:zodawushushu|zodawushushu]] || [[word:zodawukuku|zodawukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zodawuthu|zodawuthu]] || [[word:zodawuju|zodawuju]] || [[word:zodawushu|zodawushu]] || [[word:zodawuku|zodawuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zodawufthuf|zodawufthuf]] || [[word:zodawufjuf|zodawufjuf]] || [[word:zodawufshuf|zodawufshuf]] || [[word:zodawufkuf|zodawufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zodawethe|zodawethe]] || [[word:zodaweje|zodaweje]] || [[word:zodaweshe|zodaweshe]] || [[word:zodaweke|zodaweke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zodawothotho|zodawothotho]] || [[word:zodawojojo|zodawojojo]] || [[word:zodawoshosho|zodawoshosho]] || [[word:zodawokoko|zodawokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zodawotho|zodawotho]] || [[word:zodawojo|zodawojo]] || [[word:zodawosho|zodawosho]] || [[word:zodawoko|zodawoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zodawofthof|zodawofthof]] || [[word:zodawofjof|zodawofjof]] || [[word:zodawofshof|zodawofshof]] || [[word:zodawofkof|zodawofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zodawÃŸfthÃŸf|zodawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zodawÃŸfjÃŸf|zodawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zodawÃŸfshÃŸf|zodawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zodawÃŸfkÃŸf|zodawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zodawÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|zodawÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zodawÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|zodawÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zodawÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|zodawÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zodawÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|zodawÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zodawÃŸfthÃŸf|zodawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zodawÃŸfjÃŸf|zodawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zodawÃŸfshÃŸf|zodawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zodawÃŸfkÃŸf|zodawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zodawÃŸfthÃŸf|zodawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zodawÃŸfjÃŸf|zodawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zodawÃŸfshÃŸf|zodawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zodawÃŸfkÃŸf|zodawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zodawÃḊthÃḊ|zodawÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:zodawÃḊjÃḊ|zodawÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:zodawÃḊshÃḊ|zodawÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:zodawÃḊkÃḊ|zodawÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zodawathatha|zodawathatha]] || [[word:zodawajaja|zodawajaja]] || [[word:zodawashasha|zodawashasha]] || [[word:zodawakaka|zodawakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zodawatha|zodawatha]] || [[word:zodawaja|zodawaja]] || [[word:zodawasha|zodawasha]] || [[word:zodawaka|zodawaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zodawafthaf|zodawafthaf]] || [[word:zodawafjaf|zodawafjaf]] || [[word:zodawafshaf|zodawafshaf]] || [[word:zodawafkaf|zodawafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zodawasha|zodawasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zodawshÃḋsha|zodawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zodawrosha|zodawrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zodawmusha|zodawmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zodawyasha|zodawyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozodawnkshÃḋsha|gozodawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozodawnkrosha|gozodawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozodawnkmusha|gozodawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozodawnkyasha|gozodawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zodadawasha|zodadawasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zodadawshÃḋsha|zodadawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zodadawrosha|zodadawrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zodadawmusha|zodadawmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zodadawyasha|zodadawyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozodadawnkshÃḋsha|gozodadawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozodadawnkrosha|gozodadawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozodadawnkmusha|gozodadawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozodadawnkyasha|gozodadawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zedÃḊwasha|zedÃḊwasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zedÃḊwshÃḋsha|zedÃḊwshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zedÃḊwrosha|zedÃḊwrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zedÃḊwmusha|zedÃḊwmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zedÃḊwyasha|zedÃḊwyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozedÃḊwnkshÃḋsha|gozedÃḊwnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozedÃḊwnkrosha|gozedÃḊwnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozedÃḊwnkmusha|gozedÃḊwnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozedÃḊwnkyasha|gozedÃḊwnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zodfawasha|zodfawasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zodfawshÃḋsha|zodfawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zodfawrosha|zodfawrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zodfawmusha|zodfawmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zodfawyasha|zodfawyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozodfawnkshÃḋsha|gozodfawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozodfawnkrosha|gozodfawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozodfawnkmusha|gozodfawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozodfawnkyasha|gozodfawnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
